summary: ACORD metadata provider restored end-to-end. extractDocument now delivers FieldMapping[] with ranked ACORD candidates. DesignerBindingsPanel accepts candidate selections and persists them via mappingStore.chooseCandidate().

step1_extraction.acord_content: None yet — raw OCR blocks with field types

step2_mapping.acord_content: Each FieldMapping carries ranked ACORD candidates with acordCode, label, description, confidenceScore, source

step3_frontend_import.action: Calls extractText then mapFields to get FieldMapping[], then initializeMappings(documentId, mappings)
step3_frontend_import.note: PdfImportModal uses its own two-step flow (extractText + mapFields) which is the primary designer import path. extractDocument is used by DocumentIngestionTester and external consumers.

step4_field_link.called_by: PdfImportModal after addField() for each imported field

step5_binding_panel.action: onClick on candidate row → chooseCandidate(extractionBlockId, acordCode)

step6_persistence.triggers: useSelectedFieldMapping recomputes chosenCandidate → panel updates highlighting

acord_candidate_schema.label: string — human-readable display label
acord_candidate_schema.description: string | undefined — longer description from ACORD ontology
acord_candidate_schema.confidenceScore: number 0-1 — fusion score from Wave 8 multi-stage pipeline

rules.checkbox: block.type === 'checkbox' OR checkbox symbol in text
rules.radio: block.type === 'radio' OR yes/no pattern in text

field_type_classification.propagation: fieldTypes map (blockId → fieldType) returned in extractDocument response; also used in FieldRenderer for canvas display

structural_delta.status: First-extraction delta always has removedBlocks=0, changedBlocks=0. Full drift detection requires prior snapshot via detectFamilyDrift/detectCrossDocumentDrift endpoints.

confidence_thresholds.source: DEFAULT_THRESHOLDS in mappingStore.ts, overrideable via calibrationProfile

validation.binding_panel_click: Fixed — chooseCandidate() correctly called on candidate click
validation.mapping_store_init: initializeMappings() called after import with all FieldMapping[] data
validation.field_link: linkFieldToMapping() connects canvas field ID to extraction block ID
validation.acord_candidates_populated: When backend mapFields runs, suggestions array populated with ranked candidates
